narrative:
East Cleveland-03-C (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 438 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 1.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 65.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 63.9 percentage points.
